title.en: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at The Line sukhumvit 101
title.zh: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at The Line sukhumvit 101
title.th: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at The Line sukhumvit 101

summary.zh: 出售：1卧，28㎡，3,305,000 泰铢。来源 DotProperty #851d1fc4e5e8-5c30-3c62-ad6b-ef73c089。
summary.th: ขาย: 1 นอน 28 ตร.ม. ราคา 3,305,000 บาท (DotProperty #851d1fc4e5e8-5c30-3c62-ad6b-ef73c089)

description.en:
Looking for a smart entry price with immediate rental income? This 1-bedroom condo at The [hidden line] 101 is one of the most compelling investment opportunities currently available in Bangkok’s high-demand Sukhumvit corridor.
Positioned at 15.47% below market price and currently listed as the cheapest unit in the project on FazWaz, this property offers rare value for buyers seeking strong rental appeal, long-term upside, and an accessible price point in a prime BTS location.
Located on the 22nd floor, this 27.51 sqm unit enjoys a clear, unblocked city view, adding strong appeal for tenants and future resale buyers. With a tenant already in place, investors can start earning rental income immediately without waiting for setup or marketing.
Why This Unit Is a Smart Buy

15.47% below market price with the cheapest entry point in the project on FazWaz
High-floor unit with open skyline view for stronger rental and resale appeal
Strong demand from expats, working professionals, and BTS commuters
Ideal for first-time investors, portfolio buyers, or buyers seeking long-term value

Key Property Highlights

1 Bedroom | 1 Bathroom
27.51 sqm of well-planned living space
22nd floor with open,

description.en:
Enjoy comfortable city living at THE [hidden line] 101 with this stylish 1-bedroom condo. Located on the 8th floor, the unit offers a pleasant city view and a functional 32 sq.m. layout, making it ideal for both homeowners and investors.
Conveniently situated in the Sukhumvit area with easy access to public transportation, shopping, dining, and everyday amenities.
Property Details

1 Bedroom
32 sq.m.
8th Floor
City View

Asking Price: THB 4,000,000

description.en:
PropertyScout ID [hidden phone]


Fully furnished 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom condo for sale with a floorsize of 27.5 squaremeters, located on the 8th floor, at The [hidden line] />
Sukhumvit 101 building, in the popular Phra Khanong district near BTS Punnawithi. Please contact us to schedule a viewing.

Building features:
 * Building completed in 2020
 * Covered car park
 * Relaxing swimming pool
 * Security cameras
 * Beautiful garden area on premise
 * Running track
 * Modern jacuzzi




Haven’t found a place you love yet?

Our fast, professional, and multilingual team focuses on residential properties for rent and sell across Thailand in Bangkok,
Phuket, Pattaya, Hua Hin, Koh Samui, Chiang Mai and many other locations. We are one of the leading real estate agents in Thailand
and can offer you all available rental and sale units.

Contact us today and let us find you the most suitable home or investment property for a great price - at no cost to you.
